name: catfish
title: catfish
summary: File searching tool which is configurable via the command line
description:
File searching tool which is configurable via the command line
Catfish is a handy file searching tool for Linux and UNIX.
The interface is intentionally lightweight and simple, using only Gtk+3.
You can configure it to your needs by using several command line options.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use catfish because File searching tool which is configurable via the command line.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use catfish as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `catfish [options] path query` as documented upstream for catfish.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair catfish with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `catfish --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
